examples: The book is simple homespun philosophy.
Warren Buffett, the good natured financier, became a homespun folk hero, without the tools and overalls.
Once again, we have the same mix of homespun and high tech.
We pray for our troops serving far away from the warmth of family and homespun traditions.
Sometimes a great, earth-shaking, new idea in science can be created in the most homespun ways.
